/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/core/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/debug/CrashHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/debug/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/player/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/renderer/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/renderer/Frustum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/renderer/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/renderer/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/threading/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/ui/FontRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/ui/Hotbar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/ui/Inventory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/ui/Menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/ui/SettingsMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/ui/UIRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/BiomeMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/Block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/CaveGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/Chunk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/ChunkMesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/HeightPipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/Noise.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/OreGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/RegionGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/TreeGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/World.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraftc.dir/src/world/WorldGenerator.cpp.o -o minecraftc  /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/libglm.a libglad.a /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
